title: Feature Check Status
description: Per-feature evaluation outcome in content standards checks. For the two-outcome overall record verdict, see binary-verdict.

enumDescriptions.passed: Feature met the applicable content standard
enumDescriptions.failed: Feature did not meet the applicable content standard
enumDescriptions.warning: Feature is within tolerance but approaching a threshold — informational, not blocking
enumDescriptions.unevaluated: Feature was not assessed in this evaluation run (e.g., required data not present)
